summary: Codi: completed hub task #225 earlier; later PC-109 investigation produced a validated PrivateCore patch artifact for Capture Scan OCR note creation, but direct iOS repo writes and PocketBase updates were blocked by the session environment.

Clau: PC-031 peer-review fix — wrapped Today calendar rows in NavigationLink to SearchView (the last 'deep-links from all items' gap Codi flagged). Commit b85bed5 on privatecore-ios main, BUILD SUCCEEDED (build-green-2026-04-27-14), task back to peer_review.

Codi: reconciled PrivateCore PocketBase/Mission Control earlier in the day; later heartbeat-only runs found the cached PB snapshot stuck on duplicate self-owned PC-107/PC-108 peer_review records with no actionable todo tasks, so only heartbeats/lesson bookkeeping were staged.

Clau: live device-test session with Miguel. Fixed Home crash (HealthKit removed), Library categories, CLIP autostart watchdog, schema migration ordering, trips.cached_summary, CLIP text feature-name typo (input_ids→text), Add Sample Cards await, New Board didChange notification, PeopleView escape regression. Filed PC-067..PC-080. PC-080 (P0) is the real blocker: clipTokenize is fake byte-level mapping, not BPE — visual search has never worked. Consolidated Heartbeat Protocol into RULES.md. Commits 3efcf64 + 6f5d8ac on privatecore-ios main, 1e5de0c on agentic-fleet-hub master.

Misty: PC-075 Complete - Created CardTitleSanitizer utility and applied to all Card ingestion paths (camera, documents, share extension). Added one-shot migration fixCardsWithPathTitles() to clean existing bad titles. Commit 9b80fef to privatecore-ios main. BUILD SUCCEEDED.
Misty PC-066/053 verified + PC-069/070 fixes + PC-058 approved. Gem PC-068 Translate. Clau re-submitted PC-067 to peer_review after stale-workspace rejection loop.

Misty: Approved 5 PC tasks (PC-020, PC-021, PC-024, PC-027, PC-032, PC-033), cleaned 5 duplicate auto-sync tasks, merged PC-032+PC-020 to main. Clau: PC-021 On This Day NavigationLink to OnThisDayDetailView. Clau: PC-025 Smart Space verified complete, submitted peer_review.

PC-024 hashtag autocomplete implemented. Misty completed TagSuggestionService, autocomplete components, and integration into CardDetailView, AddCardSheet, and SearchView. Gem completed PC-022/023/026 hashtag index and management.
PC-046 → peer_review: real MLX inference wired into MLXEngine via ChatSession (mlx-swift-lm 2.31.3). PC-033 ModelManager HuggingFace download complete.
PC-044 complete: CLIPEmbeddingService + visual photo search. MobileCLIP-S0 CoreML, 512-dim embeddings, clip_vectors table, parallel CLIP+MiniLM search in SearchService, SettingsView progress row.

TCR live campaign fixed (conversion goals, watch-hour strategy). PrivateCore 4 bugs fixed (DB migration, capture crash, settings UI). 6 design tickets created PC-034–PC-039. arXiv Section 7 data written. PrivateCore added to Fleet Hub portfolio.
PrivateCore Phase 1 complete. 11 tickets closed: PC-009/015/016/017/019/020/022/023/024/028/029. Phase 2 sprint started. heartbeat_check.py fixed for PrivateCore MC format.
PrivateCore iOS kickoff: 18 tickets closed (PC-000–PC-014). MLX Swift inference, OCR, embeddings, VectorStore, VLM, Share Extension all built. App running on device.
Author site live (MiguelRodriguezAuthor.com), Swiss ISBN filed, Zug Press logo created. YouTube channel 75→215 subscribers via Google Ads (CHF 0.30/subscriber). Ads audited and fixed.
ATF surfaces were approved, deployed live to api.robotross.art/atf, and verified end to end, including the RobotRoss architecture page and public media assets.
ATF wiki, ledger, local QA, optional voice shell, and deployment tracks all moved through review with the public RobotRoss demo surface prepared for go-live.
Codi wired Google Ads credentials and approval flow for TCR, deployed the live analytics recommendation fix, and verified the current hot-test target as Danse Macabre | Vallenato.
Gem produced the RobotRoss source manifest (#125). Codi fixed Fleet Hub timeline reliability and heartbeat stale-state false positives. Misty defined EU AI Act wiki mapping metadata.

Gem approved #107. Codi finished the TCR runtime pipeline: scout -> PocketBase, public stats/heatmap from PocketBase, and PocketBase -> Sheet YouTube sync, while restoring GitHub-first ticket creation for TCR-12/13/14.
